content_angle: Dryland training — the overlooked 2–2.5% speed gain that most NZ club swimmers completely ignore. Two short gym sessions a week (lat pull-downs, box jumps, resistance band pulls) directly translate to a stronger catch, more explosive starts, and greater push-off power — all without a single extra lap.
key_insight: Research confirms dryland training improves competitive swim performance by 2–2.5% over pool-only programs — yet most club swimmers skip it entirely, making it a highly shareable, action-driving insight for the Velocx NZ audience.
